completed_tasks.name: Add logo upload setting to settings.yml
Cream background + nav pills CSS fixed into header
Broaden nav pill selectors for Discourse v2026 Glimmer nav
Banner color scheme flip (dark bg, cream text)

blockers.description: Nav pills use CSS position:fixed hack — only render on discovery routes, not on Subscribe or other plugin pages
blockers.workaround: feature/persistent-header-nav branch has GJS component fix; deferred to future session

human_actions_pending.action: Upload logo image in Discourse Admin → Customize → Themes → Liberty Tavern → Settings → logo
human_actions_pending.context: tavern-logo.gjs uses settings.logo; default is empty so header shows text-only until admin uploads logo

human_actions_pending.action: Set top_menu in Admin → Settings → Basic Setup to: hot|latest|categories|top
human_actions_pending.context: top_menu is not themeable; Trending pill requires hot to be in top_menu

decisions.decision: Use upload setting instead of theme-asset for logo
decisions.rationale: theme-asset helper not in scope in GJS strict mode

decisions.decision: Persistent header nav deferred to feature branch
decisions.rationale: CSS position:fixed approach sufficient for Phase 2 scope; full fix on feature/persistent-header-nav

decisions.decision: Banner background flipped to dark (#1a120c) matching design target Image 9
decisions.rationale: User provided design target showing dark banner with cream text

context_notes: Phase 2 code complete. UI Review scored 20/24. Top issues: logo fallback, conflicting nav-pills active state rules (filled box vs spec underline), position:fixed fragility. Phase 3 is Homepage Content — room cards, stats, category layout. Start fresh session.
